title: MK45 2QY, Ampthill Metal Company Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/MP3790NU/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Ampthill Metal Company Limited   Installation name: Ampthill Metal Recycling   Permit number: EPR/MP3790NU/V004   "
